category: Must match one of the 6 core pipeline categories exactly
description: Clear, executable instruction for the agent's LLM planning node
expected_tools: Array of tools required out of the 5 available tools
success_criteria: A formal, verifiable statement of truth used to evaluate completion
expected_failure: The designated injected Failure Type ID (1 of the 6 taxonomy targets)
recovery_hint: The optimal target Recovery Action mapped to the expected failure
notes: Edge cases, timeout parameters, or environment constraints
